h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

section.div: Source code of extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
Source extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
This script will fetch seasonal anime data from MyAnimeList (both Normal and Hentai) and Hentai anime data from NekoPoi and save it in a specified format.
This script will automatically rename any NekoPoi titles (well its for all video titles btw, but mainly used for Nekopoi)
Disini tempatnya projects UKK buat tahun ini ╮⁠(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠)⁠╭
Disini tempatnya projects UKK "Pembuatan Sistem Pengaduan Masyarakat" buat tahun 2023 ╮⁠(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠)⁠╭
Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Romance

div.div:
When a classroom of students is transported to another world to act as its saviors, Hajime Nagumo finds himself the weakest link. As his friends and classmates are granted strong classes and impressive abilities due to their existing skills, he is given the weak title of Synergist. When a dungeon quest leaves him separated from his group, Hajime must discover his own talents or be left to rot in this world forever.
(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

Susumu is negative and introverted. He is just living a vacant life, always been reprimanded by his mother and never resisting it. All that changed the day he met a certain person that just moved to the Condo he and his mother live in, that would bring a dramatic change in his life...he is been taught hypnotism!! Susumu will use his new godly technique on his mother but first he will use it on his next door neighbors: that hot big busted Mother and her cute daughter... (Source: AniDB)
Ore ga Kanojo wo Okasu Wake

Based on the CG collection by Yakisaba Teishoku (焼鯖定食).
Rinka, who was bored by her father for being tired of her being home late, planned to stay at her uncle's house. Her uncle was annoyed by Rinka's arbitrary attitude at home, in connection with a past that had once liked Rinka's mother named Haruka before marrying her father. Therefore, Rinka's uncle was planning evil to vent his passionate desires to her who resembled Haruka with a stimulant drug that he got working outside the city.
Note: This uncle is not a fat and ugly character in general, but a young person.
(Source: Translated and Edited from Nekopoi)
Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural

Pulled into an otherworldly adventure with cute sidekicks and superpowers, you’d think Osamu hit the jackpot. Nope! From a time before pixels, the early 20th-century gloomy author just wants to find a quiet place to meet his maker, not to rack up XP. Sadly, his poetic demise is constantly thwarted by inconvenient heroics. Dive into the hilariously tragic life of the most reluctant hero!
(Source: Crunchyroll)
Action, Adventure, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance

Yuuki Wakura watches as dueling supernatural forces ravage the Earth. Mato are portals to another dimension, avenues from which dangerous monsters escape. Peaches are resources given to women granting them abilities. Chief of the Seventh Unity of the Anti-Demon Corp, Kyouka Uzen arrives to save Yuuki from a monster. Surprisingly, Yuuki holds the power to increase the Peaches effectiveness. But to save the world, Yuuki must be willing to become Kyouka’s servant both on the battlefield and at home.
(Source: HIDIVE)
Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

The story of Jii-san Baa-san Wakagaeru follows Shouzou and Ine, an elderly couple who are living a quiet life in a farming village in Aomori Prefecture. After eating a mysterious apple that they discover on their apple farm, Shozo and Ine spontaneously regain their youth, but even after being reinvigorated they continue to live life at a grandparent-ly pace. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)
Seven Knights Revolution: Eiyuu no Keishousha

Long ago, Heroes had saved this world. Many Heroes fought against the powers of Destruction and protected the world. Years in the future… The Heroes had disappeared as the years passed and those possessing their powers called Successors now have the fate of the world in their hands. One of the elite Successors known as the Seven Knights is fighting an army of the Destruction when she saves a boy named Nemo. During the battle, Nemo awakens the powers of a Hero even he didn't know about and displays his powers as a Successor. But his Hero is someone who no one knew and no one ever spoke of.
(Source: Crunchyroll)

Luna Ishikawa is a dark and mysterious vampire—or so she'd like her new classmates to believe. The truth is, while she may be one of the not-so-mythical bloodsuckers, she doesn't really live up to the hype. She's short and clumsy, and she can't even suck blood properly! So when her classmate Tatsuta Ootori discovers her little “drinking problem,” he can't help but lend a hand. Can he nurse Luna from the small, timid animal she is into a fearsome creature of the night?!
(Source: Yen Press)
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance

"Why did I turn into a character from an adult game?" The time has come now to take action! Lucius the loser character has transformed into a villain overnight. With his new found vengeance, Lucius will set out to enjoy the action packed, harem fantasy adventure!! (Source: TOPTOON+) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

An ordinary college student Jin-Woo finds out that he can use a mysterious retro phone to pay for things with sexual acts, and they get naughtier as the transaction amount increases... How far will he be able to go with this amazing payment system? "Sir, please put it in to make your payment." (Source: DAYcomics)
Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta

It’s time for the Ousei Academy camping trip! Yuuya and his classmates head into the wilderness, where they’ll need to build shelters, find food, and otherwise fend for themselves. Yuuya quickly steals the show (and several of his classmates’ hearts) after saving the day, thanks to his maxed-out survival skills! And back in the other world, the day Yuuya promised to meet Princess Lexia has arrived. But an ambush cuts their reunion short when Luna moves to complete her mission and assassinate the princess! As Yuuya recalls their time training together in the forest—and the bond they forged—will he be able to do what’s necessary to stop her…?
(Source: Yen Press)
Ataerareta Skill wo Tsukatte Kasei de Isekai Bijotachi to Ichaicha shitai
